name: codex-hermes
description: Codex slash command for delegating work to Hermes CLI models with an autonomous review loop.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex tasks to Hermes CLI models and review the results.
interface.longDescription: Adds a /hermes slash command prompt for Codex. The command asks a Hermes CLI model for help, then has Codex review the response, run local checks when appropriate, and send up to three focused follow-up review rounds through hermes --resume.
defaultPrompt: Use /hermes to ask another model to review or solve a task
